title: You Become What You Think by Shubham Kumar Singh
description: A sharp, modern mindfulness handbook offering real-world techniques to escape toxic negative thinking spirals. Teaches readers how to consciously cultivate healthy mental imagery to drive productivity and manifest purposeful living.
imageName: /uploads/Books-To-Read/You Become What you Think by Shubham Kumar SINGH.png

title: Think and Grow Rich by Napoleon Hill
description: The definitive wealth-building classic synthesized from analyzing the financial habits of historic industrial millionaires. Delivers 13 foundational principles to transform raw desire into tangible physical assets and corporate success.

title: The Silent Patient by Alex Michaelides
description: A dark, highly addictive psychological mystery novel focusing on a famous painter who abruptly shoots her husband and completely refuses to speak. Follows an obsessed criminal psychotherapist determined to unlock her hidden motive.

title: The Psychology of Money by Morgan Housel
description: An essential financial literacy masterpiece that treats wealth management as a behavioral discipline rather than a mathematical formula. Shares 19 insightful short stories investigating how greed, ego, and luck alter our investment habits.

title: The Power of Self-Confidence by Brian Tracy
description: A definitive tactical manual mapping out standard business habits to forge unshakeable self-belief. Teaches you how to step out of comfortable stagnation zones, set clear fiscal goals, and dominate professional environments.

title: The Power of Positive Thinking by Norman Vincent Peale
description: The historic motivation handbook designed to break the destructive habits of chronic self-doubt and internal frustration. Outlines simple, faith-based psychological exercises to build unshakeable optimism and daily energy reserves.
imageName: /uploads/Books-To-Read/The Power of Positive Thinking by Norman Vincent.png

title: The Guardians by John Grisham
description: A gripping, fast-paced legal thriller centering on a dedicated group of innocence lawyers fighting to overturn a wrongful murder conviction. Uncovers a dark underbelly of corrupt courtroom operators, racial biases, and corporate hitmen.

title: The Miracles of Your Mind by Joseph Murphy
description: A timeless spiritual and mental mastery guide explaining the deep, latent potential of your subconscious mind. Dr. Joseph Murphy details easy, repeatable visualization methods to redirect your mental currents toward health, wealth, and peace.
imageName: /uploads/Books-To-Read/Miracles of Your Mind by Joseph Murohy.png

title: It Ends with Us by Colleen Hoover
description: An emotionally raw and compelling global bestseller exploring the messy, complicated realities of romance, domestic resilience, and inner strength. This powerful contemporary novel balances heartbreaking romantic tragedy with ultimate personal growth.
imageName: /uploads/Books-To-Read/It ends with Us novel by Colleen Hoover.png

title: Surrounded by Idiots: The 4 Types of Human Behavior
